summary: Packet-10's headless resume path rejected packet-09 `verifying` and `auto_fixing` sessions; the audit repaired `start_session()` to route those states back into execution recovery.
notes: Targeted validation passed: `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator.py tests/test_recovery.py tests/test_cli.py -q` (`31 passed`). `./switchyard --help` also succeeded.
